ember_lens.name: Ember Lens
ember_lens.description: Your first attack each turn deals 2 extra damage.

pilgrim_boots.name: Pilgrim Boots
pilgrim_boots.description: Your first move each turn gains +1 range.

mirror_shard.name: Mirror Shard
mirror_shard.description: Draw 1 extra card at the start of each combat.

coffin_nails.name: Coffin Nails
coffin_nails.description: Gain 2 extra embers after each combat.
